ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "temp_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point_temp_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rel_hum_percent" INTEGER /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "press_kpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in kilopascals */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., Fog, Freezing Drizzle) */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "snow_depth_cm" REAL /* Depth of snow in centimeters */,
  "cloud_cover_percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index to measure the strength of the sun's ultraviolet radiation */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index to monitor air pollution levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_condition FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the weather condition (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to take when the weather condition occurs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "agg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the aggregated data */,
  "avg_temp_c" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "avg_dew_point_temp_c" REAL /* Average dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "avg_rel_hum_percent" REAL /* Average relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "avg_wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Average wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "avg_visibility_km" REAL /* Average visibility in kilometers */,
  "avg_press_kpa" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure in kilopascals */,
  "most_common_weather_condition" TEXT /* Most common weather condition for the day */,
  "avg_precipitation_mm" REAL /* Average precipitation in millimeters */,
  "avg_snow_depth_cm" REAL /* Average snow depth in centimeters */,
  "avg_cloud_cover_percent" INTEGER /* Average cloud cover percentage */,
  "avg_uv_index" INTEGER /* Average UV index */,
  "avg_air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Average air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Fog Warning, Freezing Drizzle Warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the weather condition */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Response team responsible for handling the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, city planner, public official) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data or alert */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry accessed */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
